nasb.text: But in the midst of the uncircumcised you will be broken and lie with those slain by the sword.

esv.text: But as for you, you shall be broken and lie among the uncircumcised, with those who are slain by the sword.

cnv.text: 法老啊！至於你，你必在沒有受割禮的人中被毀滅，與那些被刀所殺的人一起長眠。

ccb.text: “法老啊，你要被毁灭，跟那些未受割礼、丧身刀下的人躺在一起。
